description:
Jira: TBD
(Jira MCP unavailable at /distill time — record TBD; PR-creation hook should backfill.)

No spec subject (epic groups stages; each stage carries its own Advances:)

Distilled from /mini-plan run 20260517-073236-claude-mini.
Plan source: ~/Documents/my-vault/LLMs/plans/-Users-mz-dev-mz-mutagen_ex/2026-05-17-downstream-adoption-fixes/runs/20260517-073236-claude-mini/05-refined-plan.md
Plan epic: think-tz4 (bw-plan, closed)
Implementation epic mirror: think-vm5 (bw-plan, will close at end of /distill)

Goal: land the minimum implementation work that unblocks downstream adoption of mutagen_ex (a downstream user installing as a dep and running 'mix mutagen' on their own project), so the remaining 1.0 work can be focused entirely on packaging (Hex), README polish, and developer experience — with no further bug-hunting.

Validated against: ~/dev/mz/elixir-test-critic (stdlib-only Elixir project with 3 modules and 19 tests). Real-world test transcript confirmed three functional blockers (host BEAMs not loaded, ExUnit not started, :mutagen_ex app not started) plus the diagnostic-blocker (error JSON has no details field) and two DX gaps (debug log leak, --json path safety still writes).

Branch: think-vm5/downstream-adoption-fixes (worktree at /Users/mz/dev/mz/mutagen_ex-downstream-adoption-fixes).

Verification command: mix test (strict pre-merge: mix compile --warnings-as-errors && mix test --include integration).

Stage children correspond to the refined plan's S1-S4.

comments.text:
Epic complete. All four children landed on think-vm5/downstream-adoption-fixes:
- S1 (mutagen-wrd.39.1): Mix task preamble (boot app + ExUnit + compile host)
- S2 (mutagen-wrd.39.2): Error JSON details field
- S3 (mutagen-wrd.39.3): Path-safety hardening + log hygiene
- S4 (mutagen-wrd.39.4): Downstream-adoption integration test

Closing epic via /deliver.

ORCHESTRATED
Children closed: 4 (S1: mix task preamble; S2: error JSON details; S3: path-safety + log hygiene; S4: downstream-adoption integration test)
BOUNCEs encountered: 2 (S4: audit→verifier then verify-FAIL→implementer over the :integration vs :downstream_integration tag collision)
User escalations: 1 (Codex sandbox seatbelt blocked writes to .git/worktrees gitdir during S1/S2/S3; orchestrator committed Codex's existing diffs on behalf as bookkeeping equivalent to ff-merge — see push notification at 09:53)

Epic branch think-vm5/downstream-adoption-fixes is ready for human PR review. Default mix test: 638/0; mix test.integration: 1/0; mix test --include integration (strict gate) trips only on pre-existing scenario_5_baseline_red golden drift (e2e_slow lane, unrelated to this epic).

title: Downstream adoption fixes (1.0 prep)
